\tzpentry{ID3869}{Kaluza-Klein Magnetic Helicity Tensor Coupling}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3869 introduces Kaluza-Klein Magnetic Helicity Tensor Coupling as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{M} = \bigoplus_{m=0}^{\infty} \left[ T^*\left(SO(3) \times \mathbb{R}^3\right) \otimes \mathcal{H}_m^{KK} \right] / \mathcal{G}_{\text{gauge}} \end{equation}
